name: dct-ytdl
description: A small Node.js YouTube downloader helper that resolves media URLs via a remote conversion service.
author: Hansa Dewmina

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/youtubedl.js && node --check lib/create-fallback-download.js && node --check lib/mp3.js && node --check lib/mp4.js && node --check lib/yt2mate.js && node --check lib/yts.js
